headline: Boeing Edges Past Airbus In Deliveries While Recovery Story Stays Complicated
summary: Boeing (NYSE:BA) has surpassed Airbus in aircraft delivery rates, marking a shift after years of production and regulatory challenges. The company reports renewed profitability alongside key wins in defense, including a PAC-3 missile seeker agreement. Boeing has supported a successful Artemis SLS core stage launch, reinforcing its role in space programs. Regulators have approved higher takeoff weights on the 787 series, expanding potential payload and range options for airlines. Quality...
